title: Mass Assignment Attack Detected
description: Detects mass assignment attacks where extra parameters are injected into API requests to modify protected fields (isAdmin, role, price). OWASP A04:2021 Insecure Design.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Web Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs') and ((('Attack Type' = 'mass_assignment' or 'Attack Type' = 'parameter_tampering')) or (('Request Body' like '*isAdmin*' or 'Request Body' like '*is_admin*' or 'Request Body' like '*"role":*' or 'Request Body' like '*"permissions":*' or 'Request Body' like '*"verified":*' or 'Request Body' like '*"balance":*' or 'Request Body' like '*"price":0*' or 'Request Body' like '*"discount":100*')))
falsepositives: Admin API endpoints that legitimately set these fields
